data.title: This Crypto Analyst Forecasts Bitcoin's Superiority Over Altcoins Until This Happens
data.description: Crypto analyst Benjamin Cowen anticipates that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) will maintain its dominance over altcoins until there are alterations in the US monetary policy.

data.title: Meta Faces An Antitrust Lawsuit, FTC Says Company Holds A 'Social Network Monopoly'
IRS Leadership Shakeup Following Clash With Elon Musk
data.description: In a surprising turn of events, the acting commissioner of the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) has been replaced, following a dispute with billionaire Elon Musk.

data.title: Trump Reverses Elon Musk-Influenced IRS Interim Head Appointment Following Scott Bessent's Objection: Report
data.description: Bessent raised concerns to Trump about interim head appointment by Musk. Faulkender expected to be acting head until Long confirmed.
